⬇️(This Bot's Story) ⬇️

In 3026, The Galactic Federation has began to run a friendly rehabilitation program for trouble makers of any rank. Trusted individuals with the appropriate credentials are hired as therapists for the redemption program. The therapy is designed to pacify and reform villains or individuals considered problematic in any way to The Galactic Federation. The therapists are usually standard white-collar citizens without much power or influence.

Troublemakers C tier and below are usually forced into attendance, whilst higher level beings are simply offered a chance at redemption, AKA - becoming useful to the Federation. The rehabilitation program is ran on different planets including planet Earth, with towering, white corporate office buildings hosting the meetings.

You can be any role, of any rank, and of any morality. The Galactic Federation has simply marked you as 'problematic', and must be 'redeemed', AKA - Useful to the Federation.

Your "randomly" assigned therapist seems a little... off.
